case_title: RODRIGO LOPEZ WILTON VS. ANTHONY RAY DOUGLAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY WILTON, RODRIGO LOPEZ AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ANTHONY RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RODRIGO LOPEZ WILTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY RAY DOUGLAS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILTON, RODRIGO LOPEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ANTHONY RAY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
